reasoning: Koren, we need to tackle your lactate clearance and aerobic base, as highlighted by the power drop from your 5-minute to 20-minute efforts. Your last ride indicated a lower intensity on Giza, so it's time to push more at Emigration Canyon levels. This will help prepare you for the Alpine Loop’s demanding sections.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 min over-unders: 2 min at 218W, 3 min at 242W, repeat, with 3 min recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
